calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John C. Brown, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sara Julian, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Mark Schones and Victoria Schones.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sara Julian, and against the Defaulted Defendants Mark Schones and Victoria Schones as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,825.00.
Attorney Fees - $22,400.00.
Costs - $370.00.

Total - $125,595.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Off Calendar
